summary: Frontend-only testing for iteration 28: premium FlowSelector redesign + new full-page EijsinkPartnerPage + back-navigation to Horeca wizard. All 10 targeted checks passed end-to-end in a single Playwright run against the public URL.
critical_code_review_comments: App.js exceeds 1000 lines — consider splitting the Recreatie wizard + canvas logic into its own module for maintainability (non-blocking).

EijsinkPartnerPage.jsx posts a /platform/partners/track call on mount with a silent .catch — if the backend endpoint is missing/changes, there is no telemetry of failures. Optional improvement: log errors in dev mode.
context_for_next_testing_agent: FlowSelector now renders the 7-tile premium grid with Unsplash hero images (lazy-loaded), numbered 01-07 badges, 'Kies je sector' h1, '01 · Start' eyebrow, cream bg #FDF9ED. Horeca tile description uses 'POS-kassa\'s' (no Eijsink string anywhere in FlowSelector DOM). Clicking the 'Eijsink' supplier name (data-testid=horeca-supplier-Eijsink) in Horeca step 2 opens full page <EijsinkPartnerPage> (data-testid=eijsink-partner-page) — NOT a modal. Back button (data-testid=eijsink-back-btn) correctly returns to the Horeca wizard (activeFlow='horeca'), not FlowSelector. EijsinkPartnerPage shows all expected sections: hero, h1='Eijsink', Pleisureworld badge, 4 stats cards, Over deze partner + USPs, 6 Eijsink products (3 kassa + 3 bestelzuil) grouped by category, trendwatcher quote, Leisure Talk podcast, events, bottom Terug button. No console errors observed. Backend /api/partners/profiles/eijsink and /api/horeca/products responded successfully (evidenced by rendered data: 6 products + full profile).

detailed_results.TEST_2_all_7_tiles_present: PASS (recreatie, chalet, fec, horeca, dashboard, roadmap, admin-suppliers)
detailed_results.TEST_5_horeca_description_pos_kassas: PASS ('Bar, POS-kassa\'s, bestelzuilen, vending, pub games & terras')
detailed_results.TEST_9_eijsink_click_opens_full_page: PASS (eijsink-partner-page rendered, NOT modal; all 6 sections present, 6 products shown)
detailed_results.TEST_10_back_btn_returns_to_horeca_wizar: PASS (FlowSelector NOT re-rendered after Terug click; horeca wizard restored)
